topics.reason: Managing matrix row operations, avoiding division by zero, and analyzing its O(n^3) time complexity can be mathematically overwhelming.

topics.query_en: Transform and conquer algorithm design paradigm
topics.reason: It requires abstract thinking to mathematically transform a problem into a simpler, known instance or different representation before solving it.
